ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities_towns" (
  "city_town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city or town */,
  "city_town_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or town */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the city or town is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or town */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the city or town */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the city or town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards_precincts" (
  "ward_precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward or precinct */,
  "city_town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town where the ward or precinct is located */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "pct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the ward or precinct */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the ward or precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "city_town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "ward_precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward or precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_city_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_town_id") REFERENCES cities_towns ("city_town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_ward_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_precinct_id") REFERENCES wards_precincts ("ward_precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "official_title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "city_town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "ward_precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward or precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_ward_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_precinct_id") REFERENCES wards_precincts ("ward_precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_city_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_town_id") REFERENCES cities_towns ("city_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote history entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "city_town_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "ward_precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward or precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_history_city_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_town_id") REFERENCES cities_towns ("city_town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_history_ward_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_precinct_id") REFERENCES wards_precincts ("ward_precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_history_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
